changeSet.author: alona
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.scooter_model (brand, model_name, max_speed_kmh, battery_capacity_wh, range_km, weight_kg, description) VALUES ('Ninebot', 'MAX G30', 30, 551, 65, 18.7, 'Premium long-range scooter with self-healing tires'), ('Xiaomi', 'Pro 2', 25, 446, 45, 14.2, 'Popular urban commuter with regenerative braking'), ('Segway', 'E45', 30, 432, 45, 16.4, 'Foldable commuter scooter with bright dual lights');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.scooter_model WHERE brand IN ('Ninebot', 'Xiaomi', 'Segway') AND model_name IN ('MAX G30', 'Pro 2', 'E45');
